taxonomy: Balanocarpus brevipetiolaris is a species of plant that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the dipterocarps, which are native to tropical Asia. The Dipterocarpaceae family is part of the larger order Malvales, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants. As a member of the Dipterocarpaceae family, Balanocarpus brevipetiolaris is a tropical tree species found in Southeast Asia.
